result:
Phase 2 is shipped. Here's what was built:

**New files (8):**
- `lib/vocab.ts` — answer matching with Cyrillic + Latin transliteration support
- `components/HeapGame.tsx` — full client-side game: mode select, 5-word loop, inline feedback, TTS, streak tracking
- `app/(app)/heap/[id]/page.tsx` — server shell that fetches heap + progress + next heap ID
- `app/api/heaps/route.ts` — GET all heaps with user progress and unlock state
- `app/api/heaps/[id]/route.ts` — GET single heap with unlock check
- `app/api/heaps/[id]/progress/route.ts` — POST upsert progress; auto-unlocks dictionary on completion
- `app/api/db/seed/route.ts` — seeds 10 heaps (50 Bulgarian words, all themes)

**Updated (5):**
- `lib/types.ts` — added `cyr?` to `HeapWord` for transliteration
- `app/(app)/map/page.tsx` — real map with lock/unlock/complete states, progress stats footer
- `app/(app)/dictionary/page.tsx` — shows words unlocked from completed heaps
- `app/(app)/profile/page.tsx` — live stats from DB

**Game mechanics:**
- 2-loop system: get all 5 in sequence (wrong = reset to word 1), do it twice to complete
- EN→BG accepts both Cyrillic (`хляб`) and Latin transliteration (`hlyab`)
- BG→EN auto-speaks the Bulgarian word via browser TTS
- Progress saved to DB after each loop and on completion; dictionary unlocked on heap complete
- Map unlocks linearly (heap N unlocks when heap N-1 is completed)

**Next:** run migrations + seed on Vercel (`POST /api/db/migrate` then `POST /api/db/seed` with `x-migration-secret` header), then test the full gameplay loop.
